stories.title: Hollywood’s theater owners get an unusually blunt promise as the merger fight intensifies
stories.dek: At CinemaCon, Paramount Skydance chief David Ellison pledged 30 annual releases with Warner Bros. if his company’s proposed acquisition wins approval, even as more than 1,000 film professionals condemn the deal.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Hollywood’s theater owners get an unusually blunt promise as the merger fight intensifies

stories.title: Anthropic’s White House moment signals a new phase in the AI policy race
stories.dek: After a high-level West Wing meeting and a fresh update to its safety policy, Anthropic is leaning harder into Washington as the AI industry heads into a year defined by regulation, procurement and national-security scrutiny.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Anthropic’s White House moment signals a new phase in the AI policy race

stories.title: White House pushes Congress to set federal AI rules as states race ahead
stories.dek: The Trump administration says a patchwork of state AI laws could slow U.S. innovation, but its new blueprint leaves lawmakers with the hard work of turning broad principles into a real national standard.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: White House pushes Congress to set federal AI rules as states race ahead

stories.title: Mahjong’s social comeback is turning a centuries-old game into a 2026 nightlife staple
stories.dek: From San Francisco bars to hobby-led travel and private events, mahjong’s resurgence shows how younger adults are trading screens for tactile, in-person play.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Mahjong’s social comeback is turning a centuries-old game into a 2026 nightlife staple

stories.title: Hormuz standoff tests fragile U.S.-Iran diplomacy as ceasefire clock ticks down
stories.dek: With Tehran again tightening its grip on the Strait of Hormuz and Washington signaling it may resume pressure if talks fail, the world’s most sensitive energy chokepoint has become the fulcrum of a fast-moving geopolitical crisis.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Hormuz standoff tests fragile U.S.-Iran diplomacy as ceasefire clock ticks down

stories.title: Justin Bieber’s Coachella surge shows how one festival set can still move pop culture in real time
stories.dek: Bieber’s April 11 Coachella performance lit up social media — and, days later, produced his biggest streaming day of 2026 so far, underscoring the festival’s continuing power as a pop culture accelerant.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Justin Bieber’s Coachella surge shows how one festival set can still move pop culture in real time

stories.title: Lebanon’s fragile truce eases a front line, but not the fear of a wider war
stories.dek: A 10-day ceasefire has stopped the worst of the fighting between Israel and Hezbollah, yet the deal has left many questions unanswered — and Lebanon’s civilians still live with the war’s wreckage.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Lebanon’s fragile truce eases a front line, but not the fear of a wider war
